business.terminateStep1Confirm:
Are you sure you want to TERMINATE this business contract?

This action will:
- Hide all places permanently
- Cancel all active bookings + refund
- Disable services & vouchers
- Downgrade owner account to User

Click OK to proceed to step 2.
